properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v5 v5 v6 v6 v6 v6 v5 v5 v6 v6 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's time for the sleeper to wake It's time for the old winds to change I hear the Spirit say, it's time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's time for the dead man to rise It's time for the Great Light to shine I hear the Spirit say, it's time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Fling wide you heavenly gates Let the King of glory in Let the King of glory in Come ride in on Your people's praise Let the King of glory in Let the King of glory in

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It's time for the dead man to rise It's time for the Great Light to shine I hear the Spirit say, it's time (oh)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Fling wide you heavenly gates Let the King of glory in Let the King of glory in Come ride in on Your people's praise Let the King of glory in Let the King of glory in

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Open up the windows, let the light in Open up the windows, let the light in Open up the windows, let the light in Let the light in, let the light in
